decision_pages.status: HEALTHY — all 15 known to Google, 7 fully indexed, 8 awaiting crawl

core_calculators.status: CONCERNING — all 10 NEUTRAL with crawl=never. Pages are indexable (HTTP 200, index,follow) but Google has not crawled them.

sitemaps.main_sitemap: NEUTRAL (649 URLs, 0 indexed per sitemap report)
sitemaps.news_sitemap: NEUTRAL (95 URLs, 0 indexed per sitemap report)

issue_analysis.category: Alternative page with proper canonical tag
issue_analysis.meaning: Google found alternate URLs for the same content (e.g., www vs non-www, trailing slash variants, or URL parameters) but correctly identified the canonical version.
issue_analysis.caused_by_v2_cleanup: Partially — formula tool variants have canonicals pointing to parent calculators. This is correct behavior.
likely_urls: Formula tool variant canonicalized to parent calculator (e.g., /tools/mortgage-calculator/30yr-6pct → /calculators/mortgage-calculator)
issue_analysis.action_required: NO ACTION — this is expected and correct. Google is correctly following our canonical tags.

issue_analysis.meaning: Google found a URL that redirects to another URL. This is a non-indexable URL that properly redirects.
issue_analysis.caused_by_v2_cleanup: Possibly — may be an old URL path that now redirects.
likely_urls: A single URL with a 301/302 redirect — possibly an old path, HTTP→HTTPS, or a trailing slash redirect not properly handled
issue_analysis.action_required: LOW — verify the 1 URL is intentionally redirected to the right destination. If it's a valuable old URL, ensure the redirect target is correct.

issue_analysis.meaning: Google crawled these 15 pages but chose not to index them. This usually means Google assessed the content as low quality, thin, duplicate, or not valuable enough.
issue_analysis.dangerous: MODERATE — only if any of the 15 are important pages
issue_analysis.caused_by_v2_cleanup: Likely — these are probably some of the formula tool variants, geo pages, or thin scenarios that were crawled before noindex was applied
likely_urls: Formula tool variants crawled before V2 noindex (Google saw them before the noindex tag)
Geo pages that got crawled before noindex
Thin scenario pages that Google crawled and rejected
Possibly 1-2 borderline quality pages that need content improvement
issue_analysis.classification: B — Expected cleanup lag (Google crawled then rejected thin pages)
issue_analysis.action_required: MONITOR — verify none of the 15 are valuable pages. If any are important, improve content. Qasem should check these 15 URLs in GSC and report which ones are important.

issue_analysis.meaning: Google knows about these URLs (from sitemaps, internal links, or external links) but has NOT yet crawled them. This is the largest issue category.
issue_analysis.dangerous: MODERATE — represents the bulk of the indexing gap. Not dangerous per se, but indicates Google hasn't prioritized crawling these URLs.
issue_analysis.caused_by_v2_cleanup: MAJORLY — This is the direct result of V2 cleanup:

likely_urls_breakdown.pruned_scenarios_noindexed: ~2,000 URLs — hash-ID scenario pages that were noindexed in V2. Google discovered them via old sitemap but sees noindex. These will eventually drop off.
likely_urls_breakdown.geo_pages_noindexed: ~588 URLs — city-specific pages (99 cities × 6 calculators) that were noindexed. Expected cleanup lag.
likely_urls_breakdown.formula_tool_variants_noindexed: ~384 URLs — parameter-based tool variants noindexed + canonicalized. Expected cleanup lag.
likely_urls_breakdown.quality_pages_not_yet_crawled: ~200-240 URLs — this is the PROBLEM subset. These include calculator hubs, blog posts, guides, comparison pages, and static pages that are indexable but haven't been crawled.
likely_urls_breakdown.other_pruned: ~50 URLs — removed pages, old redirects, etc.

issue_analysis.classification: MIXED — ~2,972 are cleanup lag (B), ~240 are important pages needing crawl (A)
issue_analysis.action_required: PARTIAL — For the ~240 important uncrawled pages: improve internal linking from hub pages, ensure sitemap freshness, improve crawl budget efficiency. For the ~2,972 cleanup lag URLs: no action needed — they will naturally drop off as Google re-crawls and sees noindex.
sub_actions: Qasem should export a sample of ~100 'Discovered not indexed' URLs from GSC and identify which are important pages vs. cleanup lag
For important pages stuck in this category: add internal links from high-authority hub pages
Verify sitemap lastmod dates are current for important pages
Consider requesting recrawl for top-20 most important uncrawled pages via URL Inspection tool in GSC

issue_analysis.category: Duplicate, Google chose different canonical than user
issue_analysis.meaning: Google found a page that it considers a duplicate of another page, and chose a DIFFERENT canonical than what you specified. THIS IS THE MOST DANGEROUS ISSUE.
issue_analysis.caused_by_v2_cleanup: Possibly — this could be a valuable page competing with another page, or a formula variant with incorrect canonical.
likely_urls: A valuable page (possibly a calculator, blog, or decision page) that Google thinks is a duplicate of another page on the site
Could be a page that's too similar to another page (thin content, similar topic)
Could be the PMI calculator issue from May 25 that was supposedly fixed
issue_analysis.action_required: CRITICAL — Qasem should identify the exact URL in GSC. Then: inspect the page's canonical tag, review content uniqueness vs the page Google chose, and fix the canonical or make content more distinct.

core_calculators.status: ALL NEUTRAL — never crawled by Google
core_calculators.health: ⚠️ CONCERNING — These are the most important pages on the site. All are indexable (HTTP 200, index,follow, in sitemap, linked from homepage). Google has not crawled any of them. This is a crawl budget or crawl priority issue.
core_calculators.root_cause_theory: Google discovered ~3,957 URLs from the original sitemaps (main + scenario). With a new domain (~4 weeks old), crawl budget is extremely limited. Google prioritized crawling the 2,000+ scenario pages (which were then noindexed) over the core calculator pages. Google MAY have also been turned off by the massive sitemap bloat and deprioritized the domain.

A_important_needs_action.description: Important indexable pages not yet crawled — calculator hubs, blog posts, guides, comparison pages stuck in 'Discovered not indexed'

B_expected_cleanup_lag.description: Noindexed scenario pages, geo pages, and formula tool variants that Google discovered but won't index. Will naturally drop off over 2-4 weeks.

C_correct_behavior.description: 4 alternate URLs with proper canonical + 1 redirect — all correct behavior
example_urls: Various formula variants canonicalized to parents

D_technical_error.description: Duplicate Google chose different canonical — needs investigation
example_urls: Unknown — Qasem must identify in GSC

api_limitations.search_analytics_api: NOT ACCESSIBLE — returns 404. Cannot fetch impression/click data by URL.
api_limitations.url_inspection_api: WORKING — individual page inspection works. Inspected 27 key pages successfully.
api_limitations.sitemap_api: WORKING — sitemaps list accessible. Main sitemap: 649 URLs, news: 95 URLs.
api_limitations.bulk_url_export: NOT POSSIBLE via API — GSC does not provide bulk export of 'Discovered not indexed' URL lists via API. Qasem must export from GSC web interface.
api_limitations.action_required_from_qasem: Export 'Discovered not indexed' URL list (at least 100 sample URLs) from GSC web interface. Export the 1 'Duplicate Google chose different canonical' URL. Export the 15 'Crawled not indexed' URLs. Export the 4 'Alternative page with proper canonical' URLs.

recommended_actions_draft.action: Identify + fix the 1 'Duplicate Google chose different canonical' URL
recommended_actions_draft.steps: 1. Qasem identifies the URL in GSC. 2. Inspect page's canonical tag. 3. Compare content with the page Google chose. 4. Fix canonical OR make content more distinct.

recommended_actions_draft.action: Improve internal linking from hub pages to core calculators and important uncrawled pages
recommended_actions_draft.steps: Add internal links from homepage to top calculators. Ensure blog posts link to relevant calculators. Add breadcrumb navigation. These signal crawl priority to Google.

recommended_actions_draft.action: Request recrawl of top 20 most important uncrawled pages via GSC URL Inspection
recommended_actions_draft.steps: Qasem manually submits top 20 important pages (core calculators, key blog posts) in GSC URL Inspection tool and requests indexing.

recommended_actions_draft.action: Qasem exports 100+ 'Discovered not indexed' URLs from GSC for classification
recommended_actions_draft.steps: From GSC web interface → Indexing → Pages → 'Discovered — currently not indexed' → export sample. Identify which are important pages vs cleanup lag.

recommended_actions_draft.action: Verify sitemap.xml freshness — ensure lastmod dates are accurate for important pages
recommended_actions_draft.steps: Check sitemap.xml generation code. Ensure important pages have recent lastmod dates to signal freshness to Google.

recommended_actions_draft.action: Monitor 'Crawled not indexed' — Qasem exports the 15 URLs from GSC
recommended_actions_draft.steps: Qasem inspects the 15 URLs in GSC. If any are important pages, improve content. If all are thin/noindexed, no action needed.

recommended_actions_draft.action: Verify the 4 'Alternative page with proper canonical' URLs
recommended_actions_draft.steps: Qasem exports the 4 URLs from GSC. Confirm they are formula variants with proper canonicals to parent calculators.
Qasem exports from GSC. Confirm the redirect destination is correct.

recommended_actions_draft.action: No action for cleanup lag URLs (~2,972)
recommended_actions_draft.steps: The 2,059 scenario pages, 588 geo pages, and 384 formula variants were intentionally noindexed. These will drop out of 'Discovered not indexed' over 2-4 weeks as Google re-crawls and confirms noindex.
